creator: tomas.volka@unicorn.eu
text:
Before i decided to compile libreoffice-legacy from ports (libreoffice-legacy-3.3.3_3), i've tried to use the libreoffice-legacy package, which exhibited same behavior.

This could be related to PR ports/160540

Application was built with default options.

If i start libreoffice, open the spreadsheet editor (calc), right click on any cell and select Format cell, the application coredumps.

Only error that appears during the libreoffice startup is:
javaPathHelper: not found

This could be related to PR: ports/160540
How-To-Repeat: Start libreoffice, open the spreadsheet editor (calc), right click on any cell and select Format cell, application coredumps after that.
